---
name: Diagram
about: Propose or update an original Mermaid diagram.
title: "Diagram: "
labels: ["type:diagram"]
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What decision, flow, state transition, architecture relationship, or failure mode
should this diagram clarify?

## Deliverable

Target path:

```text
docs/[section]/[page].md
```

## Diagram Type

Choose one:

- [ ] Flowchart
- [ ] Sequence diagram
- [ ] State diagram
- [ ] Architecture or data-flow diagram
- [ ] Failure-mode diagram

## Acceptance Checklist

- [ ] Diagram is Mermaid.
- [ ] Diagram is original and not copied or recreated from another source.
- [ ] Diagram clarifies a decision, flow, state transition, architecture relationship, or failure mode.
- [ ] Node labels are readable and specific.
- [ ] Queues, stores, trust boundaries, or async paths are shown when they matter.
- [ ] Surrounding text explains the diagram.
- [ ] Diagram avoids vendor logos, screenshots, copied layouts, and decorative complexity.
- [ ] Content follows `CONTENT_GUARDRAILS.md`.
- [ ] If prose is clearer than a diagram, the issue explains why the diagram is still needed.
- [ ] Related pages are linked.
- [ ] Available checks are run, or missing checks are noted.
